zh.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham於1445年出生在英國英格蘭肯特倫哈姆。她於大約1465年與John Atwater在英國英格蘭肯特倫哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在英國肯特倫哈姆享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特麥德斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham于1445年出生在英国英格兰肯特倫哈姆。她于大约1465年与John Atwater在英国英格兰肯特倫哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在英国肯特倫哈姆享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特麥德斯同。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham was born in 1445, in Lenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. She married John Atwater about 1465, in Lenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1500, in Lenham, Kent, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Maidstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham est née en 1445, à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John Atwater environ 1465, à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Maidstone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham wurde 1445 in Lenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1465 in Lenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom John Atwater geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Lenham, Kent, England und wurde in Maidstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham è nata il nel 1445 nel Lenham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato John Atwater circa 1465, nel Lenham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel Lenham, Kent, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Maidstone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenhamは1445年にイギリスイギリスケントレンハムで生まれた。約1465年にイギリスイギリスケントレンハムでJohn Atwaterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年にイギリスケントレンハムで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントメイドストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham(은)는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 렌함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 렌함에서 John Atwater(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 켄트 렌함에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 메이드스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham nasceu em 1445, em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com John Atwater aproximadamente 1465, em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham родилась в 1445 г. в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Atwater около 1465 г. в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности меидстоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Mary de Lenham nació en 1445, en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con John Atwater aproximadamente 1465, en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1500, en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Maidstone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
